name: color-by
description: Color-by modes for rblock plot items. Three modes depending on attribute type: vector, numeric, and text.

modes.description: Color by a vector attribute (velocity, displacement, force, etc.)
modes.notes: Defaults to magnitude. Append 'color-options scaled ramp rainbow minimum automatic maximum automatic' for rainbow scale.

modes.description: Color by a scalar numeric attribute
modes.notes: Append 'color-options scaled ramp rainbow minimum automatic maximum automatic' for rainbow scale

examples: color-by text-attribute "id" color-options named maximum-names 1000000 name-controls true
color-by text-attribute "group" 'Any' color-options named maximum-names 1000000 name-controls true
modes.notes: group attribute requires slot name ('Any' for default slot). Use 'color-options named' instead of 'scaled ramp'.
